arts.ttl: West Ham make move to sign 120k-a-week Arsenal star
arts.sum: Just like the summer transfer window, West Ham United are expected to be active in the January transfer window to make changes to their squad. They are currently struggling in the bottom half of the Premier League table and most of their summer signings have failed to make an impact at the club. arts.ttl: Man City, Tottenham handed transfer boost as Abdukodir Khusanov's agent makes statement
arts.sum: Manchester City and Tottenham Hotspur receive a boost in their pursuit of Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov after the player's representative opens the door to a potential transfer.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals who is to blame for Man City crisis
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola provided a blunt appraisal of his side's woeful run of form.

arts.ttl: Hammers make four changes for Manchester City trip
arts.sum: West Ham United: Areola, Coufal, Todibo, Kilman, Wan-Bissaka, Álvarez, Souček ©, Paquetá, Kudus, Summerville, Füllkrug Alongside Rodríguez will be goalkeeper Wes Foderingham, defenders Aaron Cresswell, Mavropanos and Ollie Scarles, midfielders Soler, Andy Irving and Luis Guilherme and forward Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola shoulders blame for Man City struggles with Citizens not in the Premier League title race
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola insists that he is to blame for the team's struggles this season, with the Citizens not involved in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Man City vs West Ham TV absence explained ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: West Ham United fans without a ticket for Saturday's clash at Manchester City will be unable to watch the action in the UK this weekend. It was introduced after fears from the EFL and below that high profile matches played at 3pm on a Saturday would put off casual supporters from attending lower league games.

arts.ttl: Why Man City vs West Ham United Premier League clash is not on TV
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking for back-to-back victories for the first time since October when they welcome West Ham United to the Etihad Stadium
